description: Tryptophan biosynthesis auxotrophic strain for G. sulfurreducens to enforce cross-feeding cooperation
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS2 then trpB then Term2
corrections_made: RBS1 replaced with RBS2, Term1 replaced with Term2. G. sulfurreducens requires Geobacter-specific translational machinery.

description: Leucine biosynthesis auxotrophic strain for G. metallireducens under nitrogen-fixing promoter
knox_spec: PnifH then RBS2 then leuA then Term2

description: MazEF toxin-antitoxin kill switch for G. sulfurreducens. Constitutive antitoxin (mazE) with inducible toxin (mazF) under Prep
knox_spec: Pconst then RBS2 then mazE then Term2 then Prep then RBS2 then mazF then Term2
corrections_made: All RBS1 replaced with RBS2, all Term1 replaced with Term2. Geobacter organism requires Geobacter-specific parts.

description: MazEF toxin-antitoxin kill switch for G. metallireducens. Constitutive antitoxin (mazE) with inducible toxin (mazF) under Prep
knox_spec: Pconst then RBS2 then mazE then Term2 then Prep then RBS2 then mazF then Term2

description: OmcZ outer membrane cytochrome overexpression to boost electron transfer to MFC anode in G. sulfurreducens
knox_spec: PomcZ then RBS2 then omcZ then Term2
corrections_made: RBS1 replaced with RBS2, Term1 replaced with Term2. G. sulfurreducens is Geobacter requiring Geobacter-specific parts.

description: OmcZ outer membrane cytochrome overexpression to boost electron transfer to MFC anode in G. metallireducens
knox_spec: PomcZ then RBS2 then omcZ then Term2

description: Polycistronic leucine biosynthesis operon in E. coli encoding leuB, leuC, leuD to create leucine auxotrophy for cross-feeding
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS1 then leuB then leuC then leuD then Term1
corrections_made: Added Ptrc, RBS1, Term1. Original spec was bare CDS list with no regulatory elements.

description: Polycistronic lysine/arginine biosynthesis operon in E. coli encoding lysC and argD for auxotrophic cross-feeding
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS1 then lysC then argD then Term1
corrections_made: Added Ptrc, RBS1, Term1. Original spec was bare CDS list with no regulatory elements.

description: Combo: OmcZ electron transfer booster combined with MazEF kill switch. High electron donation and evolutionary resistance in G. sulfurreducens.
knox_spec: PomcZ then RBS2 then omcZ then Term2 then Pconst then RBS2 then mazE then Term2 then Prep then RBS2 then mazF then Term2

description: Combo: Leucine biosynthesis operon combined with MazEF kill switch. High cross-feeding and evolutionary resistance in E. coli.
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS1 then leuB then leuC then leuD then Term1 then Pconst then RBS1 then mazE then Term1 then Prep then RBS1 then mazF then Term1

description: Combo: OmcZ electron transfer booster combined with trpB tryptophan secretion. High electron donation and auxotrophic cross-feeding in G. sulfurreducens.
knox_spec: PomcZ then RBS2 then omcZ then Term2 then Ptrc then RBS2 then trpB then Term2

description: Combo: Hydrogenase hydA under Phyd combined with MazEF kill switch. High hydrogen generation and evolutionary resistance in E. coli.
knox_spec: Phyd then RBS1 then hydA then Term1 then Pconst then RBS1 then mazE then Term1 then Prep then RBS1 then mazF then Term1
biological_warning: hydA requires maturase proteins HydE, HydF, HydG for function. Circuit is syntactically valid but biologically incomplete without co-expression of maturases.

description: Medium electron donation: periplasmic hydrogenase hyaB under PnifH. Contributes indirectly to electron flow via H2 cycling, weaker than direct OmcZ-mediated anode transfer.
knox_spec: PnifH then RBS2 then hyaB then Term2
biological_warning: hyaB electron donation and hydrogen generation scores are biologically entangled — this circuit does not cleanly separate those two traits.

description: Medium evolutionary resistance: constitutive antitoxin mazE only, without mazF toxin. Slows cheater takeover but does not actively kill cheaters.
knox_spec: Pconst then RBS1 then mazE then Term1

description: Medium evolutionary resistance: constitutive antitoxin mazE only in Geobacter, without mazF toxin. Slows cheater takeover via antitoxin pressure without active killing.
knox_spec: Pconst then RBS2 then mazE then Term2

description: Medium auxotrophic cross-feeding: single leuA enzyme only. Partial leucine pathway — weaker cross-feeding dependency than full leuBCD operon.
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS1 then leuA then Term1
biological_warning: leuA alone accumulates 2-isopropylmalate intermediate but cannot complete leucine synthesis without leuC/leuD/leuB. Cross-feeding signal is indirect. Wet-lab validation recommended.

description: Combo: OmcZ electron transfer booster combined with hyaB hydrogenase. High electron donation and high hydrogen generation in G. sulfurreducens.
knox_spec: PomcZ then RBS2 then omcZ then Term2 then PnifH then RBS2 then hyaB then Term2

description: Combo: Full leucine biosynthesis operon combined with hydA hydrogenase. High auxotrophic cross-feeding and high hydrogen generation in E. coli.
knox_spec: Ptrc then RBS1 then leuB then leuC then leuD then Term1 then Phyd then RBS1 then hydA then Term1
biological_warning: hydA requires maturase proteins HydE, HydF, HydG for function. Circuit is syntactically valid but biologically incomplete without co-expression of maturases.
